meaning: adj.<美俗> 天真地,愚蠢的,非常起劲的,狂热的
examples: The fans went totally gaga over the band.
Lady Gaga wore this tuxedo-ish number, with what looks like portions of an Elizabethan neck ruff protruding from the jacket.
This time, however, Gaga is calling the shots.
Even the most dance-floor-friendly Gaga hit has a black hole of fear at its center.
Lady Gaga (No. 7), too, is openly bisexual and champions gay rights on the national stage.
